summary: Bu chat turida Yandex Taxi dan ilhomlanib haydovchi Flutter ilovasining barcha UI ekranlari qayta dizayn qilindi. theme.dart — chuqur qora (0xFF0A0A0A) va to'yingan sariq (0xFFFFD600) ranglar, 14px borderRadius, surfaceTintColor transparent; login_screen va register_screen — har doim qora fon, AnnotatedRegion bilan system bar ranglari, katta sariq tugma; home_screen — qora drawer (sariq avatar), pill uslubidagi NavBar, status bar paddingini o'z ichiga oluvchi header, yangilangan statusCard/offlineState/searchingState/onlineStatusHeader; order_card — sariq ID badge, route block, taximeter qatori, animated pulsing dot; profile_screen — qora heroCard (sariq avatar, rounded), yangi balans kartasi, info card section label; history_screen — qora earnings card, stat pills, left-accent bar order tiles; chat_screen — sariq operator avatar, sariq haydovchi pufakchalari, borderless input, animated send button. flutter analyze 0 xato.
current_status: Barcha 7 ta ekran va widget Yandex Taxi uslubida qayta yozildi. flutter analyze 0 error, faqat 9 ta info/style maslahat. Ilova `flutter run` bilan muvaffaqiyatli ishga tushgan.
